caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a black cap, headphones, and a black t-shirt with the text "CHECK IT!" printed on it. The background includes a banner with stars and the words "Unique Muscle," as well as a sign that reads "Boss Talk 101." The man appears to be engaged in conversation, gesturing with his right hand while speaking into the microphone. The setting suggests a professional yet casual atmosphere, typical of a podcast recording environment.
